name: Mulligans Indoor Golf
about: Mulligans Indoor Golf is a Texas-based facility designed for year-round golf entertainment, offering a state-of-the-art environment to play, practice, and socialize regardless of weather conditions. The venue features tour-grade Uneekor QED simulator bays equipped with cutting-edge technology for high accuracy and instant shot display. It caters to a broad audience, from serious golfers looking to improve their game to newbies seeking to learn, while also providing a social atmosphere with dining options and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Uneekor QED simulator technology for high accuracy
Social atmosphere with food and drink options
Facility available year-round, independent of weather
Golf instruction available with professional coaching

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with items like Grilled Chicken Sandwich Basket, Cheeseburger Basket, Double Cheeseburger Basket, Candy Bars, and Party Sampler. Private party food options are also available.
No mention of alcohol service found.

simulator_hardware.notes: Cutting edge simulator bays providing superb accuracy and instant shot display.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides tour-grade equipment suitable for all skill levels, making it unnecessary for customers to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified. The venue offers an extensive food and non-alcoholic drink menu for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Mulligans Indoor Golf welcomes families and offers coaching for juniors and youth, making it suitable for all ages.
